mapper.select: SELECT a.approval_id, a.type_id, a.title, a.content, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.applicant_id, a.approver_id, a.status_id, a.calendar_id, app.emp_id AS applicant_id, app.name AS applicant_name, apr.emp_id AS approver_id, apr.name AS approver_name, t.type_name, s.status_name FROM approval a JOIN employee app ON a.applicant_id = app.emp_id LEFT JOIN employee apr ON a.approver_id = apr.emp_id JOIN approval_type t ON a.type_id = t.type_id JOIN approval_status s ON a.status_id = s.status_id WHERE a.applicant_id = #{applicantId} ORDER BY a.approval_id DESC

SELECT a.approval_id, a.type_id, a.title, a.content, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.applicant_id, a.approver_id, a.status_id, a.calendar_id, app.emp_id AS applicant_id, app.name AS applicant_name, apr.emp_id AS approver_id, apr.name AS approver_name, t.type_name, s.status_name FROM approval a JOIN employee app ON a.applicant_id = app.emp_id LEFT JOIN employee apr ON a.approver_id = apr.emp_id JOIN approval_type t ON a.type_id = t.type_id JOIN approval_status s ON a.status_id = s.status_id WHERE a.approver_id = #{approverId} ORDER BY a.approval_id DESC

SELECT a.approval_id, a.type_id, a.title, a.content, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.applicant_id, a.approver_id, a.status_id, a.calendar_id, app.emp_id AS applicant_id, app.name AS applicant_name, apr.emp_id AS approver_id, apr.name AS approver_name, t.type_name, s.status_name FROM approval a JOIN employee app ON a.applicant_id = app.emp_id LEFT JOIN employee apr ON a.approver_id = apr.emp_id JOIN approval_type t ON a.type_id = t.type_id JOIN approval_status s ON a.status_id = s.status_id WHERE a.status_id = #{statusId} ORDER BY a.approval_id desc

SELECT a.approval_id, a.type_id, a.title, a.content, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.applicant_id, a.approver_id, a.status_id, a.calendar_id, app.emp_id AS applicant_id, app.name AS applicant_name, apr.emp_id AS approver_id, apr.name AS approver_name, t.type_name, s.status_name FROM approval a JOIN employee app ON a.applicant_id = app.emp_id LEFT JOIN employee apr ON a.approver_id = apr.emp_id JOIN approval_type t ON a.type_id = t.type_id JOIN approval_status s ON a.status_id = s.status_id WHERE a.approval_id = #{approvalId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval(type_id, start_date, end_date, title, content, applicant_id, approver_id) VALUES (#{typeId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{title}, #{content}, #{applicantId}, #{approverId})
INSERT INTO calendar (title, start_date, end_date, applicant_id, approval_id) SELECT title, start_date, end_date, applicant_id, approval_id FROM approval WHERE approval_id = #{approvalId}
